description:
Secure collaboration and messaging

Element is a Matrix-based end-to-end encrypted messenger and secure collaboration app. It’s decentralized for digital sovereign self-hosting, or through a hosting service such as Element Matrix Services. Element operates on the open Matrix network to provide interoperability and easy connections.
✨ Features
- User status in user menu (#33797). Contributed by @dbkr.
- Room list: add notifications to section headers (#33826). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: remove logic to expand a section when a filter is selected (#33785). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Add mechanism to locally enforce MSC1763 retention rules (#33772). Contributed by @Half-Shot.
- Disable URL previews per-message when the message provides a hint (#33775). Contributed by @Half-Shot.
- Room list: improve section in room list context menu (#33733). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: remove "Sections are only for you” in edition section dialog (#33780). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: remove checkmark in section toast (#33779). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: add fade effect to room list item being dragged (#33696). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Add user status on user profile icon (#33653). Contributed by @dbkr.
- [Labs] Sign in with QR on new EW using generated QR for MSC4108 v2024 (#33184). Contributed by @t3chguy.
- Room list: add expand all icon to room list header (#33732). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Implement new separator design (#33599). Contributed by @MidhunSureshR.
🐛 Bug Fixes
- [Backport staging] Fix broken scrollbar introduced by separator redesign (#33947). Contributed by @RiotRobot.
- Apply html utils sanitiser to embedded page (#33842). Contributed by @t3chguy.
- Room list: fix keyboard navigation on sections (#33809). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: hide the empty/collapse icon when the room list is empty (#33814). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Handle unknown screens better (#33793). Contributed by @t3chguy.
- Make presence icons & colours consistent throughout the app (#33764). Contributed by @dbkr.
- Add padding to account for input outline in devtools (#33766). Contributed by @Johennes.
- Limit width of the display name in user menu (#33746). Contributed by @dbkr.
- Room list: hide empty section when a filter is enabled (#33747). Contributed by @florianduros.
- Room list: display compose menu when sections are enabled (#33725). Contributed by @florianduros.
